title: Crispy Chickpea Fritters
description: A Mediterranean-inspired snack with crispy chickpea fritters made with simple ingredients. Perfect for a quick bite or as a side dish.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
In a large bowl, mash chickpeas using a fork until they're mostly smooth.
Add crispy breadcrumbs, mediterranean seasoning, flour, and a pinch of salt to the bowl. Mix until well combined.
Add the beaten egg to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Using your hands, shape the dough into small patties.
Carefully place the patties in the hot oil and fry for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
